# backlogbox.com llms.txt

> BacklogBox is an all-in-one media backlog tracker. Organize books, movies, TV shows, games, and podcasts using customizable Kanban boards with automatic metadata, public profile sharing, and custom lists for anything else.

## Pages

- [BacklogBox — Media Tracker & Backlog Manager](https://backlogbox.com): Track and organize your media backlog with Kanban boards. Free forever, Pro trial included.
- [Free Trial Registration](https://backlogbox.com/register): Register for a free trial account.

## Blog

- [Blog — Media Tracking Tips & Guides](https://backlogbox.com/blog): Tips, guides, and strategies for organizing your media backlog.
- [Best Media Tracker Apps in 2026](https://backlogbox.com/blog/best-media-tracker-apps): Compare the top media tracker apps for books, movies, TV shows, games, and podcasts.
- [Best Goodreads & Letterboxd Alternative](https://backlogbox.com/blog/best-goodreads-letterboxd-alternatives-all-in-one-media-tracker): Why an all-in-one media tracker beats juggling single-media apps.
- [How to Organize Your Media Backlog](https://backlogbox.com/blog/how-to-organize-your-media-backlog): Guide to organizing and managing media backlog effectively using a Kanban system.
- [Game Backlog Management Guide](https://backlogbox.com/blog/game-backlog-management-guide): A complete guide to tackling your game pile of shame.
- [Personal Kanban for Entertainment](https://backlogbox.com/blog/personal-kanban-for-entertainment): Apply the Kanban method to organize what you watch, read, and play.
- [TBR Pile Management Guide](https://backlogbox.com/blog/tbr-pile-management-guide): Practical strategies for managing your to-be-read list.
